title: "When all else fail, post photos ..."
content:
... I think I said this one already. :P

!/gallery/20040925/hdd01.jpg!

!/gallery/20040925/hdd02.jpg!

My 5-6 years old harddrive decided to die last night. Good thing: it belongs to the FreeBSD server not the Macintosh. So I didn't lose much of the critical data. Bad thing: it's the drive that held most of my active backup. Now, when was the last time I did complete backup of my data??? Hmmmm ... March, I think. --"

Now the drive has become a decorative item. (Sounds a lot better than __a piece o' junk__, don't you think?)

!/gallery/20040925/oldies.jpg!

I dropped by CD Warehouse last week and found this "Ultimate Manilow!":http://www.amazon.com/exec/obidos/tg/detail/-/B0001IW2S4/qid=1096119068/sr=8-3/ref=pd_csp_3/002-4397339-6100834?v=glance&s=dvd&n=507846 CBS Special DVD. Couldn't resist, bought it. By its side is Tony Bennett's "Live in San Francisco":http://www.amazon.com/exec/obidos/tg/detail/-/B00007G1V2/qid=1096119220/sr=1-1/ref=sr_1_1/002-4397339-6100834?v=glance&s=dvd. Bought this one awhile a go. Love both ... No regret.

!/gallery/20040925/eagles.jpg!

The Eagles will be at Impact Arena mid of next month - and I'll be there. Hopefully, _The Eagles_ are not afraid of _the H5-N1_ (or the so-called Bird Flu)!!!

Good Day!

%(me)P.S. If you read the news lately, you'll agree with me that __gold fishes__ are MUCH better than __politicians__!%
